title: Run a pipeline task and reconcile counts
description: Execute a pipeline task (or its tests) and report row counts, reconciliation against source, and idempotency of a rerun.
body: Use when validating a data pipeline change. Actions: detect the orchestrator/build, run the task or its tests on a sample partition, then run it again and confirm identical output; report source-vs-target row counts and any reject/dead-letter counts. Compare the two runs to prove idempotency. Do not declare success from a green task without checking counts. This skill exposes capability only and must not run production backfills without runtime permission. Validation signals include reconciled counts and identical reruns. Risk boundary: if a rerun changes row counts, report the task as non-idempotent rather than passing.
